mapper.sql: ID, ODD_PLAN_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, REPORT_START_TIME, REPORT_END_TIME, DURATION, REMARK, OPERATE_ID, LOG_TYPE, HOUR_METER_START, HOUR_METER_END
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN_DETAIL_LOG
OPERATE_ID = #{operateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY REPORT_START_TIME ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN_DETAIL_LOG( ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, ODD_PLAN_ID, REPORT_START_TIME, REPORT_END_TIME, DURATION, REMARK, OPERATE_ID, LOG_TYPE, PARENT_ID, HOUR_METER_START, HOUR_METER_END ) VALUES ( #{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now}, #{entity.oddPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.reportStartTime}, #{entity.reportEndTime}, #{entity.duration, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.operateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.logType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.hourMeterStart, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.hourMeterEnd, jdbcType=DECIMAL} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
